upgradePolicy.reason: TraceMind uses SDK content hash as the source of truth so coding agents can detect updates even if a human forgets a version bump.
upgradePolicy.agentPrompt: Ask your coding agent to run tracemind.project_health, read .tracemind-sdk.json, call tracemind.capture_setup({ platform }), update the vendored swift SDK, run verificationCommands, and report the result.
